definitions.text: To change (or to be changed) from a solid state to a liquid state, usually by a gradual heat.
examples: I melted butter to make a cake.
When the weather is warm, the snowman will disappear; he will melt.

definitions.text: To soften, as by a warming or kindly influence; to relax; to render gentle or susceptible to mild influences; sometimes, in a bad sense, to take away the firmness of; to weaken.
Molten material, the product of melting.
The transition of matter from a solid state to a liquid state.
The springtime snow runoff in mountain regions.
